mnemonics.title: RGB Color Model
mnemonics.content: RGB: RED GOES BLUE - REMEMBER PRIMARY COLORS FOR ADDITIVE MIXING

mnemonics.title: Morphological Operations Order
mnemonics.content: OPENING: ERODE THEN DILATE - OPENS GAPS CLOSING: DILATE THEN ERODE - CLOSES HOLES

mnemonics.title: Edge Detection Steps
mnemonics.content: CANNY: GAUSSIAN SMOOTHENS GRADIENT NON-MAXIMUM SUPPRESSES DOUBLE THRESHOLDS HYSTERESIS

mnemonics.title: Chain Code Directions
mnemonics.content: 0-3 FOR 4-CONNECT: RIGHT DOWN LEFT UP 0-7 FOR 8-CONNECT: ALL 8 DIRECTIONS CLOCKWISE

acronyms.usage: Deep learning architecture for image classification and feature learning
Color space for color-based segmentation and filtering
Specific area in image selected for focused analysis
Converting text images to machine-readable text

visualTips.visualization: Imagine edges as rapid brightness transitions - draw profile lines showing step changes at boundaries
Erosion shrinks like sand eroding rock; Dilation expands like inflating balloon; Use structuring element as probe
Draw compass rose with 8 directions, trace boundary following arrow directions, record numbers as you walk
Picture dividing pizza into slices - each slice represents a region with similar toppings (characteristics)
Think of finding Waldo in crowded image - slide small Waldo picture across, find best match position

analogies.analogy: Image processing is like applying filters to a photograph in Photoshop; Computer vision is like the AI that describes what's in the photo to a blind person
Like identifying key characteristics of a suspect - height, hair color, scars - to recognize them later
Like examining an image through increasingly focused magnifying glasses - first finding edges, then shapes, then complex objects
Like using flood fill in painting software - pixels of same color get grouped into selection regions
Like using sandpaper to smooth rough edges then filling in - removes small noise while preserving main shape
